titleStmt.title: SII 26.728: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 728. (A.R. No. 677 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Jaṭāvarmaṉ Sundarapāṇḍayadēva I: Year [11] Makara (Tai) śu. [tithi is not mentioned], Wednesday, Rōhiṇī = 1261 A.D., January 12, f.d.n. ·19.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places.
It contains the praśasti of the king beginning with Samasta-jagadādhāra, etc., in Sanskrit, engraved in Grantha characters.

It records a gift by the nāṭṭavars, the kāṇiuḍaiyārs and the kāṇiuḍaiyaaraiyars of Mīśeṅgaḷi-nāḍu in Teṉkarai Jayaśiṅgakulakāla-vaḷanāḍu, to the temple of Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, in Vaḍakavi-nāḍu in the same vaḷanāḍu. It states that the above-mentioned people received from three persons of Tīyanēri, the village Tīyanēri having an extent of 12 vēli and with all its residential areas, tank, and gardens and gave it together with its puñjai land, shares, etc., to provide for the festival instituted in the name of the ruler ending with the day of his natal asterism, in the temple. It is further stated that the gift was a tirunāmattukkāṇi, and that the donors themselves would pay the various taxes in respect of the village and that the income from the levies like makaṉmai, śiṟṟāyam etc., should be paid to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastajagadādhāra tilaka madhurāpuri
vidrāvaṇaka kakari kuṭapākala vi ripudurgamardadana virakaṇṭhago
pāla vipunadāvanadahana kāñcipuravarādhiśvara gaṇapati hariṇaśārddūra
nelurapuraviracita virābhiṣeka praṇatirājapratiṣṭhācāryyamahārājādhi
rāja parameśvara makara nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu budhan- kiḻamaiyum
peṟṟa rokaṇi ṉāḷ teṉkarai jayaciṅkakulakāla vaḷanāṭṭu miceṅkaḷināṭṭuk kāṇi Uṭai
ya nāṭṭavaromum Innāṭṭuk kāṇi Uṭaiya kaḷum Iṉṉāṭṭuk kāṇi Uṭaiya Araiyar
kaḷomum Āka Ivvaṉaivom Iṉṉāṭṭu vaṭakaviṉāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruneṭuṅkaḷamuṭaiya
nāyaṉār koyil Āticaṇṭecuvara tevarkaṉ(m)mikaḷukku ṉāṅkaḷ pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu
Iṟṟaiṉāḷ ṉāṅkaḷ Inta miceṅkaḷa ṉāṭṭuk kāṇi Uṭaiya Araiyarkaḷil tiyaneriyil tiyaneri Uṭaiyāṉ mu
varaiyaṉ kurukularāya nāṭāḻvāṉum tevāṇṭāṉum Ivaṉ tampi Aḻakiyāṉum Āka Inta Aṉaivar pakkalilum nāṅ
kaḷ koṇṭu Uṭaiyorāṉa tiyanerikku Icainta kiḻpāṟkkellai teṟkkoṭi kaṇṇaṅkuṭip peruvaḻi
kku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkkellai veṇṇaimaṅkalattu pākāciriyattu vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai paḻa
ṅkuṭikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Araiyar kuṟiccikkuḷattu teṟkkum Āka Icaitta Iṉṉāṉkellaikku
Uṭppaṭṭa Ūrnattamum kuḷamum toṭṭamum viḷai nilam 10 2lim Iṉṉilam paṉṉiru veliyum puñcaiyum pākamum pā
kāciriyamum pocāṟum potaravum Ivai Aṉaittum Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku Ulakuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār cuntarapāṇṭiyate
var tirunakṣatra tirtthamāka candrādityavaraiyya tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷuvatāka nāṅkaḷ caṇṭeśvara
nāyaṉār ciyattattile tirunāmattukkāṇi nirvārttuk kuṭuttu nāṉkellaiyum tiruccūlattāpaṉamum
paṇṇik kuṭuttom miceṅkiḷi nāṭṭavarom Uṭaiyār tiruneṭuṅkaḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉār ko
yil Āticaṇṭeśvaratevar kaṉmikaḷukku In tiyaneri Iṉṉāyaṉārkku tirunāmattukkāṇi Ākavum
Inta tiyaneriyāl varum kaṭamai kuṭimai maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum nāṅkaḷe Irukkakkaṭavo
mākavum mākkalk kaṭamaikku veliyāl tūṇippatakku nellu Irukkakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ivvūril makaṉ
mai ciṟṟāyam Uḷḷatu Iṉṉāyaṉārkku Āvatu Ākavum Ippaṭikku tirukkaṟṟaḷaiyile cilālekai paṇ
ṇikkoḷḷak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭiyoḻiya Iṉṉāṭṭile Ittirunāmattik kāṇikku virotam
puttara kavum nam O ḷākavum
Digital edition of SII 26.728 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
